title: bidens longistyla
intro: Bidens longistyla, also known as the long-styled beggar-ticks or long-styled tickseed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the sunflower family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Bidens longistyla include reducing inflammation and relieving symptoms of colds, fever, and respiratory issues, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antiviral properties. Bidens longistyla can be prepared as a decoction or tincture, and has also been used in combination with other herbs in traditional medicine.
